sse_body_text_from_HAR: EMPTY (Chrome did not persist SSE body in HAR — this is normal for streaming responses)
IMPORTANT_OBSERVATION: duck.ai SPA RENDERED a warning text in the chat panel: '⚠ 이 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. 민감한 정보가 포함된 요청은 외부 AI 서비스로 전송할 수 없습니다.' This suggests current envelope DOES render in SPA — contradicting #880 FAIL_PROTOCOL assumption. Recommend re-verifying #880 before envelope iteration.
extract_limitations: HAR export does not include SSE response bodies. To get raw chunks, must use either (a) Chrome DevTools 'Copy as cURL' + replay externally, (b) instrument fetch via Console to dump chunks, or (c) use a proxy like mitmproxy.
alternative_evidence_path: Use the lib.91d392df...js or entry.duckai.693d99bc...js bundles to find the SSE parser - look for 'data:' or EventSource patterns
